title: Pyrex 1041511 Multi-Purpose Rectangular Mould with Lid 0.8 Litres Glass Transparent 19 x 14 x 4 cm
features: Suitable for freezing, reheating, microwave and storing
description: Product Description Pyrex, a committed French brand! At Pyrex, we are committed to a free and uninhibited style of cooking, free from codes of perfection. For over 100 years, our Pyrex cookware and storage containers have been inspired by a love of French cuisine. Our commitment is to develop and produce healthy and durable glass products in our French factory, suitable for a wide range of uses! Previous page Cook & Freeze Storage dishes... but not only! Cook & Freeze, the ideal range for preserving your favourite dishes! Suitable for freezer and refrigerator Can be stored down to -40°C Dishwasher safe Hygienic material that won't accumulate stains or odours Easy to wash Cooking and reheating Microwave oven (without lid) Hygienic material Extreme heat resistance (up to 300°C) easy to store and use Space-saving nesting boxes Shock-resistant Next page 1 Discover Cook & Freeze 2 Store 3 Easy to wash 4 Cooking and reheating 5 Easy storage Discover the COOK & FREEZE range ! 4 storage boxes with lids Add To Basket 8 storage boxes with lids Add To Basket 4 mealprep boxes Add To Basket 3 food storage boxes Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.8 out of 5 stars 1,495 4.7 out of 5 stars 74 4.0 out of 5 stars 37 4.6 out of 5 stars 61 Price £32.89 £ 32 . 89 £52.99 £ 52 . 99 £33.24 £ 33 . 24 £24.99 £ 24 . 99 Airfryer safe (without lid) ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Oven safe (without lid) ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Microwave safe (without lid) ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Dishwasher safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Freeze & Fridge safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Scratch resistance (glass) ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Reusable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Pyrex Borosilicate glass ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Made in France ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Shape & Dimensions Rectangular - 4 capacities Multi shapes and capacities Same - 0,8L 2 rect + 1 square Ideal for MealPrep Family size mealprep Meal Prep Zero Waste The video showcases the product in use. A COMMITMENT MADE TO LAST Sustainable products We are committed to bringing the highest quality cookware to every home in the world. Preserving our environment Our aim is to continually reduce our CO2 emissions, improve waste management and minimise our footprint on the planet. French manufacturing Pyrex glass has been made in France since 1970, symbolising the excellence of the French glass industry thanks to unrivalled expertise. Stop food waste! At Pyrex, we fight food waste with the conviction that food that is better preserved and consumed is also food that is thrown away less. Previous page Next page
